strengths: Clear identification of three well-chosen objects with recognizable real-world contexts
Coherent and mostly well-explained links between each object and IA prompt #13 (improvement)
Solid justification of each objectâs contribution, supported by historical comparison and some quantitative evidence
Appropriate structure (table, headers) demonstrating alignment with TOK exhibition requirements
weaknesses: Analytical depth and critical reflection are limited, with many assertions taken at face value
Key contextual details and precise citations are missing for several claims (e.g., airport security statistics, Newton sources)
Repetitive or descriptive commentary in places, lacking explicit TOK vocabulary (justification, reliability)
Some narrative gaps and formatting inconsistencies (incomplete sentences, unclear headers)
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition meets many of the characteristics of the 7â8 band: it clearly identifies three specific objects, situates them in real-world contexts, and makes coherent, evidence-based links to the IA prompt. The student demonstrates a good understanding of how each object exemplifies âimprovementâ in knowledge. However, imprecision in contextual details, limited critical engagement with TOK concepts, and occasional descriptive repetition prevent full attainment of the top band. Balancing these strengths and weaknesses against the examinerâs overall mark of 7, the exhibition merits a score of 7 out of 10.

annotations.comment: Claims of 13% decrease in terrorist attempts are presented without citation details. Provide source evaluation and methodological context to support statistical assertions.
To deepen analytical rigor, incorporate TOK concepts such as justification and reliability when concluding how past knowledge improved security protocols.
Specify the physical representation of Newtonâs work (e.g., a printed manuscript or book) to ground the abstract formula in its material context.
The infinite series is accurately rendered but the student should link this mathematical artifact to the TOK prompt by defining âimprovementâ criteria in knowledge production.
ProofWiki is a tertiary source with variable reliability. Recommend consulting primary historical or peer-reviewed sources for Newtonâs original publications.
Historical overview of Archimedesâ method provides useful contrast, illustrating the evolution of mathematical techniques.
The description of Ludolph van Ceulenâs process is informative but not directly linked back to the IA prompt; clarify how this sets criteria for âimprovementâ.
Incorporate explicit TOK vocabulary (e.g., âjustificationâ, âevidenceâ) when discussing how Newton leveraged prior knowledge to justify his formula.
Detailing the 16 digits calculated in 22 terms quantifies Newtonâs efficiency, directly supporting the concept of improved methods.
The table clearly presents IA prompt #13 and word count 949, adhering to exhibition requirements and demonstrating clear alignment with the TOK prompt.
Consider expanding this header to include the object title, linking Commentary 1 explicitly to the airport security object for greater clarity.
The image is relevant but lacks contextual details such as the specific airport and date. Clarifying the real-world context will strengthen the objectâs relevance.
The description outlines procedural differences but lacks citation of 1987 security guidelines. Including authoritative sources will substantiate these claims.
The comparison between 1987 and post-9/11 security effectively demonstrates change, linking the object to historical events.
Referring to Newton simply as a âknowerâ misses an opportunity to discuss how personal biases and the historical context shaped his knowledge claims.
Link the conclusion back to the IA prompt explicitly by stating how efficiency in calculation constitutes an improvement in knowledge.
Label the object directly in the header (e.g., âCommentary 3: Woodâs 1853 Glass Syringeâ) for clarity and consistency.
The image size and detail are appropriate, but the student should provide provenance information (e.g., museum, collection) to contextualize the artifact.
The description of Woodâs innovation (glass + plunger) clearly illustrates the technological advancement over prior instruments.
The sentence âThese iterations of the syringe involvedâ is incomplete. Revise to ensure coherence and complete the historical narrative.
Acknowledgement of the syringeâs convenience captures how design changes serve knowers, aligning with the IA promptâs focus on improvement.
The claim about silicone oil affecting purity needs supporting data or citations. Suggest referencing studies on material-drug interactions.
Expand the conclusion to discuss how modern syringes meet criteria of knowledge improvement beyond convenience (e.g., safety, efficacy).
In the source list, group and format citations according to a recognized style guide (e.g., APA) to enhance academic conventions.
Are there more recent statistics on terrorism decline that would provide a more current evaluation of security improvements?
Consider adding annotations in the source list indicating which reference supports specific evidence in Commentary 2 for transparency.
The source âYates, K. (2024)â appears tangential; clarify how this modern article supports Newtonâs 17th-century context.
Inclusion of a contemporary source on polymer syringes hints at extending analysis, demonstrating awareness of continuing knowledge evolution.
To integrate this final source, explicitly discuss in the main commentary how polymer syringes represent further improvements.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
